positive: Minimalist geometric composition of stylized mountains and sun setting over a peaceful meadow. The mountain range features clean, thick silhouettes of layered peaks in deep indigo, burnt orange, and warm ochre tones. A single, stylized crescent moon and a simple geometric sun circle hang in the gradient sky. The meadow is rendered with abstract, repeated patterns of simple wildflowers and geometric grass tufts. Style: Flat vector illustration, highly contrasting colors, retro travel poster aesthetic, clean lines, symmetry, suitable for apparel screen printing, solid background.
negative: photorealistic, gradient background, blur, artifacts, text, logo, watermark, messy, complex details, bad anatomy, noisy, low resolution, graffiti, sketch, grunge
